title: grausa micrantha
intro: Grausa micrantha, also known as a flowering plant, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Grausa micrantha has been found to have various health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as an antacid. In terms of herbal preparations, Grausa micrantha can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in a decoction.
